Desk finish:
Matte black plastic laminate. The
photo was taken with the ceiling
light turned on, which reflects on
the surface.
Desk finish:
Matte black plastic laminate. The
photo was taken with the
photographer's back to the light
fixture, and in this case it doesn't
reflect on the finish.
When working, I always use a
notebook to take notes, and this one
doesn’t reflect light. Sometimes the
sun streaming through the window
can be annoying.

The Materials
in the Space
Black-out curtains.
Plasticized fabric, 75% polyester and 25%
fiberglass. It prevents light from coming
in from the exterior and ambient light
needs to be turned on. However, since
it's white, it reflects light.
Vinyl paint wall finish.
The color helps prevent light from
reflecting in the space during the day. But
if it’s a cloudy day, it won’t be useful since
the ceiling light will need to be turned on.
